headline: Oklahoma settles 20-year poultry-litter lawsuit
summary: The new settlement covers all six of the original defendants – Tyson Foods, Cargill, George's, Peterson Farms, Cal-Maine and Simmons Foods.

raw.headline: Oklahoma settles 20-year poultry-litter lawsuit
raw.summary: The new settlement covers all six of the original defendants – Tyson Foods, Cargill, George's, Peterson Farms, Cal-Maine and Simmons Foods.

headline: Conagra Brands Q4 Earnings on the Horizon: Key Factors to Note
summary: CAG readies for Q4 results as revenue growth prospects face pressure from higher commodity, protein and tariff-related costs.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Tyson Foods, Lowers Price Target to $65
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Thomas Palmer   maintains Tyson Foods (NYSE:TSN) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $71 to $65.

raw.headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Tyson Foods, Lowers Price Target to $65

headline: 1 Mid-Cap Stock with Promising Prospects and 2 We Avoid
summary: Many investors pay attention to mid-cap stocks because they have established business models and expansive market opportunities. However, their paths to becoming $100 billion corporations are ripe with competition, ranging from giants with vast resources to agile upstarts eager to disrupt the status quo.
